pr.title: Archive completed planning docs from active `.agents/plans`
pr.body:
The active `.agents/plans` directory still contained multiple plans already marked `completed`, which made the working set harder to scan. This change moves those finished plans into the archive and refreshes the plan indexes to match the current state.

- **Plan archive cleanup**
  - Moved completed plan files from `.agents/plans/` into `.agents/plans/archive/`.
  - Kept file contents unchanged; this is an inventory reorganization only.

- **Active index refresh**
  - Updated `.agents/plans/README.md` to remove archived entries from the active index.
  - Replaced the stale active list with an explicit empty-state pointer to the archive.

- **Archive index refresh**
  - Updated `.agents/plans/archive/README.md` to include the newly archived plans.
  - Preserved the archive as the historical source of truth for completed work.

- **Reference fixups**
  - Updated related-plan guidance so references to `037-subticks.md` now point at its archived location.
pr.author: Copilot
